description:
Custom Rich Presence (playing status) manager for Discord. Features run on startup and minimizing to tray.


Changes:
- Updated Spanish, Persian, Hebrew, Korean, Dutch (new translator, ZethalMC), Polish, Portuguese, Portuguese (BR), Slovak, Thai (new translator, Platong34821).
Thanks to Anonymous (whoever donated $5 via bitcoin) and Ribtex for their donations! If you want to donate as well, check out CustomRP's website!
.exe will install the program to %appdata%\CustomRP; .zip is a portable version of the program.
AppVeyor Build 258
